column1: # Stage 1 contract matrix for Sui transaction adapter coverage.
# Parser success is not signing authorization. Adapter coverage says which
# offline facts are available before Firmware applies final account binding and
# the selected device-local signing mode. Sponsored gas may have adapter review
# coverage while still failing the final account-binding gate.
# offline_review_coverage=complete means Firmware can display the bounded
# offline facts listed in required_review_fields. It does not mean Firmware can
# simulate execution effects. required_policy_fields contains exact policy fact
# field names that must be emitted when policy coverage is complete;
# policy-incomplete rows use none because policy mode rejects before active
